strengthen.pillTooltip: How recognizably YOURS this résumé reads to a recruiter. Raise it by adding the specifics only you know.
strengthen.atsTooltip: How well this résumé matches the keywords and structure applicant-tracking software scans for.
strengthen.bannerBody: A recruiter spends six seconds. Make them count.
strengthen.analyzing: Checking your résumé through a recruiter's eyes…
strengthen.recruiterReady: Recruiter-ready. No quick wins left: this résumé reads as unmistakably yours.
strengthen.regenerateNudge: This résumé needs more than quick wins. Consider adding more detail to your CV and regenerating.
strengthen.meterRemaining: The dashed stretch is what the remaining wins are worth.
